PORT.description: Port for the proxy server to listen on.

CDISC_PRIMARY_KEY.description: Primary API key for CDISC Library.

CDISC_SECONDARY_KEY.description: Secondary API key for CDISC Library.

CDISC_PROXY_PREFIX.description: Path prefix for the CDISC proxy.

CDISC_PROXY_MAX_BODY_BYTES.description: Maximum allowed request body size in bytes.

CDISC_TRUSTED_INGRESS_HEADER_NAME.description: Header name for trusted ingress assertion.

CDISC_TRUSTED_INGRESS_HEADER_VALUE.description: Header value for trusted ingress assertion.

CDISC_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins.

PROXY_ALLOWED_HEADERS.description: Comma-separated list of additional allowed headers.

CDISC_ALLOW_UNTRUSTED_ORIGINS.description: Set to true to allow unrestricted CORS access.

CDISC_UPSTREAM_BASE_URL.description: The base URL of the upstream CDISC API.

VITE_TOTAL_COUNT_HEADER.description: Header to read total count from (frontend).

VITE_API_BASE_URL.description: Deployed CDISC proxy base URL for frontend.

SCHEMATHESIS_MAX_EXAMPLES.description: Max examples per endpoint for fuzz testing.

SCHEMATHESIS_STRICT.description: Fail fuzz testing if Schemathesis returns non-zero.
